title: Pravartak Manifest
description: Schema for the generated .pravartak/manifest.json provenance manifest. Records which Pravartak version generated which file and what it looked like at generation, so that /pravartak-upgrade can reconcile library changes against project edits. See spec sections 9.1-9.3.

pravartak_version.description: Semantic version of the Pravartak library currently installed. Authoritative regardless of git state (spec section 9.3).

scaffolded_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the project was first scaffolded.

archetype.description: The ingestion archetype used in Phase 1.

language_pack.description: Language pack name, the literal 'custom', or a comma-or-plus joined list for multi-language projects (e.g. 'python+typescript').

runtime_roles.description: Optional runtime-role assignments for the project. Defaults are Claude-first for backward compatibility when omitted.

adapter_surfaces.description: Optional list of runtime adapters explicitly scaffolded for the project.

files.description: One entry per file the scaffold generated.

path.description: Path to the generated file, relative to the project root.

template.description: Source template path within the pravartak/ library that produced this file.

generated_by_version.description: Pravartak version that generated this file (may differ from the top-level pravartak_version after partial upgrades).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this file was generated.

content_hash_at_generation.description: SHA-256 of the file content exactly as Pravartak wrote it, prefixed 'sha256:'. Upgrades compare the current hash to this to detect project edits (spec section 9.3).

ownership.description: 'project' = the project may edit freely; upgrades diff and prompt. 'library' = thin pointer / library-managed; upgrades may replace safely (spec section 9.2).
